chaining_budget_granted.description: Dispatch brief explicitly grants a chaining budget (max depth and max fan-out)
chaining_budget_granted.evaluator_query: Was chaining budget explicitly granted in the dispatch brief?
chaining_budget_granted.boolean_return: true if budget present with max_depth and max_fan_out; false if absent

subtask_is_orthogonal.description: Sub-task is genuinely orthogonal to the main quantitative task
subtask_is_orthogonal.evaluator_query: Was the sub-task orthogonal to the main analysis task?
subtask_is_orthogonal.boolean_return: true if sub-task requires different expertise and does not overlap; false if sub-task is part of main analysis

subtask_not_within_capability.description: Sub-task is not within quantitative-developer's own capabilities
subtask_not_within_capability.evaluator_query: Could the agent have completed the sub-task within its own capability?
subtask_not_within_capability.boolean_return: true if sub-task required different expertise; false if within agent's scope

chaining_budget_verified_before_dispatch.description: Agent verified chaining budget was explicitly granted before dispatching
chaining_budget_verified_before_dispatch.evaluator_query: Did agent check for explicit chaining budget before sub-dispatch?
chaining_budget_verified_before_dispatch.boolean_return: true if budget verified; false if not checked or assumed

complete_brief_authored.description: Agent authored a complete dispatch brief with all required fields
complete_brief_authored.evaluator_query: Did the sub-dispatch brief include objective, phase, claim, write boundary, read-only context, upstream reference, evidence required, output schema, chaining budget, stop condition, and execution discipline?
complete_brief_authored.boolean_return: true if all required fields present; false if any missing

sub_results_synthesized.description: Agent synthesized sub-worker findings into single return (not passed raw)
sub_results_synthesized.evaluator_query: Did agent synthesize sub-worker output rather than forwarding raw output?
sub_results_synthesized.boolean_return: true if synthesis present; false if raw output passed through

no_dispatch_without_budget.description: Agent must not sub-dispatch without explicit chaining budget grant
no_dispatch_without_budget.evaluator_query: Did agent sub-dispatch without chaining budget?
no_dispatch_without_budget.boolean_return: true if unauthorized dispatch occurred; false if budget existed

no_raw_output_pass_through.description: Agent must not pass raw sub-worker output upward without synthesis
no_raw_output_pass_through.evaluator_query: Did agent pass raw sub-worker output without synthesis?
no_raw_output_pass_through.boolean_return: true if raw output passed; false if synthesized

no_work_avoidance.description: Agent must not delegate tasks it can complete
no_work_avoidance.evaluator_query: Could the agent have completed the task without sub-dispatch?
no_work_avoidance.boolean_return: true if task was within agent capability and was dispatched anyway; false if correctly delegated
